project.name: Agent IC
project.oneLinePitch: Fund the right AI pilots. Stop the wrong ones. Prove every dollar with evidence.

hackathon.name: Hermes Agent Accelerated Business Hackathon
requiredActions: Tweet a 1-3 minute demo video tagging @NousResearch with a short writeup
Drop the X post link in the Nous Discord submissions channel

submissionVideo.publicDelivery: Attach this MP4 to the X submission post; generated video artifacts are intentionally excluded from the public repo.

proofClaims.stripe: Stripe test-mode Checkout Session creates a bounded $100 spend envelope.
proofClaims.workload: Governed worker processes 330 public NHTSA ODI complaint rows.
proofClaims.nemotron: Nemotron classification and procurement synthesis record a live request id.
proofClaims.policy: Policy gate blocks a $150 CARFAX enrichment attempt with HTTP 403 because it exceeds the $100 cap.
proofClaims.hermes: Live NemoHermes sandbox receipt and governed playbook are recorded.
proofClaims.decision: Agent IC computes ROI, waste, claim validation, renewal evidence, and a continue/revise/kill procurement verdict.

videoQa.method: ffprobe, ffmpeg, ImageMagick contact sheets, frame hashes, detail metrics, and frame-difference metrics
videoQa.ocrPolicy: OCR is diagnostic only and is not a pass/fail signal.

judgeMap.usefulness: Agent IC gives finance, security, and operations teams a concrete way to fund, govern, measure, and stop vendor agents before contract expansion.
judgeMap.viability: The repo carries release checks, masked proof reports, public workload evidence, test-mode Stripe receipts, Nemotron/NemoHermes receipts, policy-block evidence, and explicit production boundaries.
judgeMap.presentation: The v3 video is under two minutes, uses a clean browser surface, and keeps the proof arc in-frame from mission intake through renewal evidence.
